name: az-pixiu
description: Local, read-only, observability-first Azure FinOps agent

scripts.eval:compare: tsx src/cli.ts eval eval/phase-1.json --use-playbook --credential azure-cli --observability langfuse --experiment-name 13-model-compare --models gpt-4o,gpt-4.1,gpt-5-mini,gpt-5.4,gpt-chat-latest,DeepSeek-V4-Flash,DeepSeek-V4-Pro,grok-4.3,Kimi-K2.6,Kimi-K2.7-Code,gpt-5.6-luna,gpt-5.6-sol,gpt-5.6-terra
